title: Nephrangis filiformis
taxonomy: Nephrangis filiformis is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification is further divided into the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Nephrangis is part of the tribe Vandeae. The exact classification of Nephrangis filiformis may be subject to ongoing research and refinement in the field of botany.
uses: Nephrangis filiformis has been traditionally used in folk medicine, but its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically verified.
